title: WSLP@EMNLP 2026 Shared Task - Isolated Sign Language Recognition (ISLR)
description: Isolated sign recognition from Indian Sign Language (ISL) videos data to their corresponding word labels (glosses)
description_zh: 印度手语（ISL）视频数据中的孤立手势识别到其对应的词标签（词汇标注）

pages.title: Overview
pages.content:
Welcome to the WSLP@EMNLP 2026 Shared Task: Isolated Sign Language Recognition (ISLR)

Advancing Indian Sign Language Understanding through Isolated Sign Recognition

Registration

To participate in this shared task, please navigate to the "Participate" tab and create a Codabench account using a valid institutional email address or personal email id.

Please ensure that your team name/user name is clearly identifiable and used consistently throughout your submissions.

Overview

Sign languages, such as Indian Sign Language (ISL), are rich and complex visual languages. This shared task invites participants to tackle the challenge of recognizing isolated ISL signs (words or glosses) from short video clips. The goal is to build systems that can accurately identify individual signs, which is crucial for applications like dictionary building, lookup tools, and annotation.

Participants are required to build models that can classify an input video clip to its corresponding word label.

Phases

This competition consists of two distinct phases:

     
  • Phase 1: Training & Validation – Participants will develop and validate their models using a training set and a corresponding validation set.
    •  
  • Phase 2: Testing – A held-out test set will be released. Participants will submit predictions to evaluate their models' generalization capabilities.

Task Details:

     
  • Input: ISL video clip or pose sequence
    •  
  • Output: Word label (gloss)
    •  
  • Metrics: Top-1, Top-5, Top-10 Accuracy

Submission Guidelines

Each submission must be a ZIP archive containing the following file:

     
  1. answer.csv – A comma-separated file with columns:    
           
    • Column 1: uid (as provided in the validation/test files, representing the unique video identifier)
    • Column 2: pred1 (the predicted word label/gloss for the corresponding uid)
    • Column 3: pred2 (the predicted word label/gloss for the corresponding uid)
    • Column 4: pred3 (the predicted word label/gloss for the corresponding uid)
    • Column 5: pred4 (the predicted word label/gloss for the corresponding uid)
    • ....
    • ....
    • ....
    • Column 11: pred10 (the predicted word label/gloss for the corresponding uid)
      •    
        Note: Ensure that the uid and their order exactly match those in the original reference file. Mismatches may result in incorrect scoring or disqualification. For Top-K accuracy beyond Top-1, your submission file would need to include multiple predictions per uid.  

For reference, sample submission files is provided. "Sample submission file"

To submit your results, go to the "Submit Results" tab and upload your submission.zip file. You may make multiple submissions per day during the competition phases, subject to limits.

Results and Leaderboard

Results will be displayed on the "Results" tab. Teams will be ranked primarily based on Accuracy, with Top-K Accuracy (where K = 1, 5, 10) as a secondary metric. The top-performing teams will be highlighted and recognized at the WSLP 2025 event.

Acknowledgements

This shared task is part of the Workshop on Sign Language Processing (WSLP 2025), co-located with EMNLP 2026 at Budapest, Hungary. We thank all participants, contributors, and the broader research community for supporting this initiative.

To stay updated and connect with other participants, join our Discord server

  • Discord : Shared Task
  • Discord : Workshop
  • Shared Task Webpage
pages.content_zh: # 欢迎来到WSLP@EMNLP 2026共享任务：孤立手语识别(ISLR) #### 通过孤立手语识别推进印度手语理解 ## 注册 参与本共享任务，请导航至"参与"标签，并使用有效的机构邮箱或个人邮箱创建Codabench账户。 请确保您的**团队名称/用户名**清晰易辨，并在所有提交中保持一致。 ## 概述 手语（如印度手语(ISL)）是丰富而复杂的视觉语言。本共享任务邀请参与者从短视频片段中识别孤立ISL手语（词汇或手语符号）。目标是构建能够准确识别单个手语的系统，这对字典构建、查询工具和注释等应用至关重要。 参与者需要构建能够将输入视频片段分类到对应词汇标签的模型。 ## 阶段 本竞赛包含两个不同阶段： - **阶段1：训练与验证** – 参与者将使用训练集和对应的验证集开发并验证其模型。 - **阶段2：测试** – 将发布保留测试集。参与者提交预测以评估其模型的泛化能力。 ### 任务详情： - **输入：** ISL视频片段或姿态序列 - **输出：** 词汇标签（手语符号） - **指标：** Top-1、Top-5、Top-10准确率 ## 提交指南 每次提交必须是包含以下文件的ZIP存档： 1. `answer.csv` – 一个逗号分隔文件，包含以下列： - 第1列：`uid`（在验证/测试文件中提供，代表唯一视频标识符） - 第2列：`pred1`（对应`uid`的预测词汇标签/手语符号） - 第3列：`pred2`（对应`uid`的预测词汇标签/手语符号） - 第4列：`pred3`（对应`uid`的预测词汇标签/手语符号） - 第5列：`pred4`（对应`uid`的预测词汇标签/手语符号） - .... - .... - .... - 第11列：`pred10`（对应`uid`的预测词汇标签/手语符号） **注意：** 确保uid及其顺序与原始参考文件完全匹配。不匹配可能导致评分错误或取消资格。对于Top-1以外的Top-K准确率，您的提交文件需要为每个`uid`包含多个预测。 参考示例提交文件已提供。"样本提交文件" 要提交您的结果，请转至"提交结果"标签并上传您的`submission.zip`文件。在竞赛阶段期间，您可以每天进行多次提交，受限制条件约束。 ## 结果和排行榜 结果将显示在"结果"标签上。团队将主要根据准确率排名，Top-K准确率（K = 1、5、10）作为次要指标。表现最好的团队将在WSLP 2025活动中获得突出和认可。 ## 致谢

pages.title: Data
pages.content:
📂 Datasets

🔹 The training datasets can be downloaded from the following link: 👉 Download Training Dataset

🔹 The Validation datasets can be downloaded from the following link: 👉 Download Validation Dataset

🔹 The Test datasets can be downloaded from the following link: 👉 Download Test Dataset

🌍 In addition to the provided datasets, participants are encouraged to explore and utilize other publicly available resources to strengthen their models. One such dataset is CISLR 👐, a large-scale benchmark for Indian Sign Language Recognition and Translation. Leveraging external datasets like CISLR can help improve generalization ✨ and robustness 💪 of the models.
pages.content_zh:
📂 数据集

🔹 训练数据集可从以下链接下载：👉 下载训练数据集

🔹 验证数据集可从以下链接下载：👉 下载验证数据集

🔹 测试数据集可从以下链接下载：👉 下载测试数据集

🌍 除了提供的数据集外，鼓励参赛者探索并利用其他公开可用资源来增强其模型。其中一个这样的数据集是CISLR 👐，一个用于印度手语识别和翻译的大规模基准。利用CISLR等外部数据集可以帮助提高模型的泛化能力 ✨ 和鲁棒性 💪。

pages.title: Evaluation
pages.content:
Evaluation Criteria

Your submissions will be evaluated based on Top-1 Accuracy, Top-5 Accuracy, and Top-10 Accuracy.

  • Top-1 Accuracy: Measures the percentage of test samples where the correct word label is the highest-ranked prediction.
  • Top-5 Accuracy: Measures the percentage of test samples where the correct word label appears within the top 5 ranked predictions.
  • Top-10 Accuracy: Measures the percentage of test samples where the correct word label appears within the top 10 ranked predictions.

These metrics capture both strict recognition performance (Top-1) and more flexible settings (Top-5, Top-10) where the system can return multiple likely candidates.
pages.content_zh:
评估标准

您的提交将基于Top-1 准确率、Top-5 准确率和Top-10 准确率进行评估。

  • Top-1 准确率：衡量正确词标签是排名最高预测的测试样本百分比。
  • Top-5 准确率：衡量正确词标签出现在前5个排名预测中的测试样本百分比。
  • Top-10 准确率：衡量正确词标签出现在前10个排名预测中的测试样本百分比。

这些指标既能捕捉严格的识别性能（Top-1），也能评估更灵活的设置（Top-5、Top-10），其中系统可以返回多个可能的候选项。
